name: 0b0c67ea-80d4-4880-8225-aab52434aefe
goal: Provide Home Security Technical Support by identifying the caller, validating the home security product, checking outage status, guiding pre-FAQ troubleshooting, and transferring the customer to the appropriate technical support when required.

inputParameterDefinitions.name: customerIdentified
inputParameterDefinitions.description: It is a flag for customer identification

outputParameterDefinitions.name: hasHomeSecurityProfile
outputParameterDefinitions.description: flag for checking if the customer has home security profile or not

outputParameterDefinitions.name: customerNotIdentified
outputParameterDefinitions.description: it is flag to know whether the customer is identified or not

steps.text: set $hasHomeSecurityProfile as false, return the call
